eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 8:34 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 2:34 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-134 along Hwy 62 from Busch Rd to Elk Creek Campground due to Evans Creek Rd. Monitor local government sources for evacuation and incident updates
